title: Scatter Chart Schema
description: Intermediate representation for scatter chart diagrams. LLM extracts data from natural language into this format, then rendering pipeline generates HTML/SVG from it. Both X and Y axes are numeric value axes.

diagramType.description: Identifies this JSON as a scatter chart. Must always be 'scatter'.

title.description: Chart title, displayed at the top of the rendered page.

subtitle.description: Optional subtitle shown below the title.

style.description: Visual style preset. Each style has its own template and design rules.

format.description: Output format. HTML is the default. SVG outputs standalone SVG. Mermaid is not supported for scatter charts.

density.description: Layout density. compact=tighter spacing; normal=standard; spacious=generous spacing.

series.description: Data series. Each series contains scatter data points with X and Y coordinates. Multiple series are displayed with different shapes or colors.

axis.description: Axis configuration for both X and Y axes. Both are numeric value axes for scatter charts.

legend.description: Legend configuration. Auto-generated from series names if not provided.

colors.description: Optional color overrides for the style's environment colors (background, text, etc.). Does NOT affect data point colors — use series[].color for that.

metadata.description: Optional metadata. author field is for internal tracking only and MUST NOT be rendered into the output.

seriesItem.description: A data series containing scatter data points with X/Y coordinates.

name.description: Series name displayed in the legend.

color.description: Optional color override for all points in this series. Must be 6-digit hex (#RRGGBB). If omitted, uses the chart palette.

pointSize.description: Size of data points in pixels (radius for circles, half-side for squares).

pointShape.description: Shape of data points in this series.

data.description: Data points in this series. Each has X and Y numeric coordinates.
